raw_text:
--- Page 1 # I AM THE CHANGE ## Scholarship Program — Home Visit Questionnaire Team Everest | Confidential **Volunteer Name:** Geetha Hande **Co-Volunteer Name:** Went with family **Date of Visit:** 4th Jul 2026 ## Section 1 — Student Profile ### 1.1. Application ID Enter Application ID TEMP - 2026-9491 ### 1.2. Student Full Name Enter full name Sadhana M ### 1.3. Gender ☐ Male ☒ Female ☐ Others ## Section 2 — Family Background ### 2.1. Family Status ☐ Single Parent ☐ Parentless ☒ Having both parents ### 2.2. Relationship Details (if applicable) | Year of Death / Separation | Reason for Death / Separation | |----------------------------|-------------------------------| | | | | | | ### 2.3. Is Father/ Mother photograph kept at home? ☐ Yes ☐ No ### 2.4. Government ID Verified (Ration Card / Aadhaar / Driving Licence / Voter ID) ☒ Aadhaar Card ☐ Ration Card ☐ Driving Licence ☐ Voter ID ☐ Other: ______ ### 2.5. Family Members | Name | Age | Education | Occupation | Annual Income | |------------|-----|--------------------------|----------------------------------------|-----------------------------------| | Murugan | 47 | 7 th std | Contractor
Worker at
Corporation | Rs. 2,20,000/- (Approximate) | | Vanitha | 46 | — | — | — | | Dinesh | 20 | 10 th std +
ITI | AC Repair
Training | — | | Nageshweri | 65 | — | — | — | | Sadhana | 17 | BCA (1 st year)| Student | — | --- Page 2 ## Section 3 — Housing Condition ### 3.1. House Ownership ☐ Own ☒ Rented #### --- Page 2 --- 3.1.1 If rented, what is the rent amount? Rent amount Rs. 8,500/- ### 3.2. Type of Home ☐ Individual ☒ Private Apartment ☐ Housing Board ☐ Line House ☐ Others: ______ --- Page 3 ### 3.3. Type of Ceiling ☐ Roof (Kurai) ☐ Tiled ☐ Asbestos / Sheet ☒ Concrete ### 3.4. Number of Bedrooms Enter number 1 ### --- Page 4 --- 3.4.1 Type of Bedroom ☒ Separate Bedroom ☐ No Separate Bedroom ### 3.5. Bathroom ☒ Separate ☐ Common for Apartment ### 3.6. Kitchen Type ☒ Separate Kitchen ☐ Hall with Kitchen ## Section 4 — Financial Background ### 4.1. Assets at Home (tick all that apply) ☒ Washing Machine ☒ Fridge ☐ AC ☒ LED TV ☒ Two-Wheeler ☐ Car ☒ Smartphone ☐ Separate Wi-Fi ☐ Others: ______ ### 4.2. Amount of Last Electricity Bill Amount in ₹ Rs. 1500 (2 months) ### 4.3. Do you own any other assets/properties in the name of grandparents, parents, or student? ☐ Yes ☒ No ### 4.3.1 If yes, list their properties: | Property Description | Owner Name | Approximate Value | |----------------------|------------|-------------------| | | | | --- Page 4 ### 4.4. Apart from your job, is there any other source of income? ☐ Yes ☐ No ### 4.4.1 If yes, list other sources of income: | Source of Income | Amount | |----------------------|-------------| | Son's training Income| 7,000 (Monthly) | ### 4.5. Income Type ☐ Monthly ☒ Daily ☐ Weekly ☐ Ad-Hoc ### 4.6. Do you have any loans? ☐ Yes ☒ No --- Page 5 ### 4.6.1 If yes, share Loan Purpose, Amount Taken, and Pending Loan Amount: | Sr. No. | Loan Purpose | Loan Amount Taken | Pending Loan Amount | |---------|--------------|-------------------|---------------------| | | | | | ## Section 5 — Health Information ### 5.1. Does the student have any health issues? ☐ Yes ☒ No ### 5.2. If yes, list the health issues: Describe health issues ## Section 6 — Student Commitment ### 6.1. Will you study college for three years without any obstacle? Committed + willing to complete the course, take up job. ### 6.2. If we have a training program within 15 km from your home, can you come? ☒ Yes ☐ No ☐ Maybe Ready to travel. ### 6.3. Are you ready to send your son/daughter to weekly skill development classes on Sundays (16 classes a year)? ☒ Yes ☐ No --- Page 6 # Section 7 — Scholarship Information ### 7.1. Has the student received or applied for any other scholarships for their UG degree? None # Section 8 — Volunteer Observation ### 8.1. What is your opinion about the student, their family members, and their living condition? Student is hardworking, wants to study to elevate family. Family members are very prompt, genuine & gave details of everything with proof. Living condition is not so good with 5 members living in cramped hall, bedroom & kitchen ### 8.2. Will you recommend this student for this scholarship? ☒ Yes ☐ No ☐ Not Sure ### 8.3. Any other comments you want to share? Recommend for scholarship as family is poor, honest and is seriously looking forward for their daughter's welfare. **Volunteer Signature** Geetha.M. **Co-Volunteer Signature** ### 4.7. If you choose any college, how much is the college fee? Amount in ₹ Patrician College - 77,000 (per year). ### 4.8. If the college fee is higher, how will you manage it? Father's income + Jewels kept at Bank ### 4.9. If you do not receive this scholarship, how will you pay the fees? Further Jewellery mortgage (From grandmother)
